shortFormVideo.hook: Citation work only helps when it points buyers back to a page they can trust.
shortFormVideo.script: Open with a quick list of mismatched directory listings, then move to the practical fix: Google Business Profile, homepage promise, service page, reviews, local mentions, and internal links all telling the same story. Close by showing the EB28 guide and the Melbourne Web Studio project brief as the next step.
onScreenText: Connect mentions to a useful page
shortFormVideo.creativeBrief: Vertical 20-30 second explainer. Use screen captures of the article, a simple citation consistency checklist, and the Melbourne Web Studio lead leak quiz CTA. Public contact path should be the site form or richducat@gmail.com.

publishPolicy: Owned-social copy is prepared as drafts only. No external social channel was published because no EB28-owned account/channel was verified in this run.
